prompt: A realistic outdoor portrait photo of a young woman standing at a zoo snack stand on a sunny day, framed from about mid-thigh upward, centered in the image, holding 3 long churros upright in her left hand. The churros are inside a light brown paper sleeve printed with green text reading “zoo” and a cute illustrated animal face near the bottom. Her face is obscured by a large soft-edged rectangular blur block, but the rest of the image is crisp and photorealistic. She has a short neat bob haircut in dark brown with a slight side part and natural shine. She wears a pale powder-blue ribbed turtleneck knit top under a sleeveless beige zip-front dress with a square neckline, decorative pearl-like buttons near the zipper, and a matching belt with a square buckle at the waist. Warm natural sunlight creates soft shadows and bright highlights, with shallow depth of field and creamy background bokeh. In the background, place a wooden snack kiosk with signage suggesting a churro stand, a paved zoo walkway, a green trash bin, a few tiny distant visitors, trees, and sunlit foliage. The mood is casual, cute, and candid, like a lifestyle snapshot taken at a Japanese zoo. Use a vertical smartphone-photo composition, realistic skin and fabric textures, clean neutral tones, and slightly airy exposure.
